name: Brave Search MCP
description: Brave Search MCP server. Gives AI agents privacy-preserving web and local search with an independent index — no Google dependency, no tracking, structured results.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Run web searches against Brave's independent index and return ranked, structured results

skills.name: Local Search
skills.description: Search for nearby businesses and places with location-aware results and business details

skills.name: News Search
skills.description: Retrieve recent news articles filtered by topic with publication date and source metadata

skills.name: Image Search
skills.description: Search for images with structured metadata including dimensions, source URL, and description

skills.name: MCP Native
skills.description: Works out of the box with Claude Desktop and any MCP client via the official Brave MCP server
